name: cough
title: best herbal teas for cough
description: Eupatorium perfoliatum tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that help to soothe and calm a persistent cough. The tea's demulcent properties help to form a protective barrier on the mucous membranes, reducing irritation and inflammation, while its expectorant properties aid in the removal of mucus and phlegm from the respiratory tract.
